warnings.warningText: Diarrhea, genital mycotic infections, volume depletion, and diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) were more common with sotagliflozin versus placebo
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for diarrhea, genital mycotic infections, volume depletion, and diabetic ketoacidosis

warnings.warningText: Key adverse events in SCORED trial include DKA, GI effects, genital mycotic infections, volume depletion, and severe hypoglycemia
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with diabetes and reduced kidney function (eGFR 25-60 mL/min/1.73m²)
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for diabetic ketoacidosis, gastrointestinal effects, genital mycotic infections, volume depletion, and severe hypoglycemia

warnings.warningText: Key adverse events in SOLOIST trial include genital mycotic infections and urinary tract infections
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with diabetes and heart failure
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for genital mycotic infections and urinary tract infections

warnings.warningText: Sotagliflozin is a dual SGLT1 and SGLT2 inhibitor and is not currently available for commercial use
warnings.actionRequired: Verify availability and regulatory approval status before prescribing

warnings.warningText: In Europe, the European Commission has approved sotagliflozin for use in Type 1 diabetes as an adjunct to insulin
warnings.actionRequired: Consider regulatory status and approved indications when prescribing in Type 1 diabetes
